title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners
company: Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners!
